source.expected_signals: store footprint, openings and market presence

failure_modes: public markdown returned without detected access-control stop signal
snippet: Target has stores and supply chain facilities across the country and offices around the world — but they’re so much more than buildings or points on a map. They’re epicenters for strategy, service, community and fun. Where our incredible team works together, across the globe, to bring the magic of Target to life — and spark joy in our guests’ everyday lives.
